jsonLd.title: CaratLane is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!
